verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a source in times of need. That gives me hope, That brings me peace. In every trial, Through every test. My saviour stands in my defence

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So when the road you walk, Leaves you tired and worn. And all your strength is gone, And your heart feels torn. Remember God is greater than the storm. Take courage for The battle is the Lord's.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And when the waters rise, He calls my name. And bids me come, Out on the wave. He holds my hand, Lest I should falter. And He makes me stand, Upon the water.
